text:
Once upon a midnight dreary while I ponderedweise…I saw Betty dragging wool onto furniture. My wife!

Maybe we’ll hang blankets.

She likes cuddles. She sleeps next to me.

Sometimes I lay next to her.

She snores.

I just want my sleep.

I want to be lost.

Maybe I’ll go run.

My stomach growls.

I’ll eat nothing.

Just run. Get lost.

I could starve.

But I’ll get skinny.

They don't like skinny people.

I love you. I thought hard.

I’ve lost love.

Maybe go back dancing.

We danced years ago.

Not go dancing.

Just walk.

We walk quite often.

Maybe stop somewhere.

You’ll love it.

Where’s the coffee?

We’ll find something.

We do that.

I could run wild.

Maybe wild bears.

I ran wild.

Like that little girl.

It went wild.

I think that’s me.

I’m lost.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
